detail.description:
🐾 What kind of life will your kitty live?
Become a kitten and experience every moment yourself in this cute idle life game!

From a little kitty to an elderly cat, you’ll grow step by step, making meaningful choices along the way.
Pick a career, fall in love, and enjoy unique events and adventures in a world filled only with cats.
Every choice leads to a different story, so no two lives are ever the same!


🐾 Life Choices
Decide how your kitten will grow.
Choose careers, discover love, and sha
